settings.content:
# VaultSpace Staging

**Application Status:**
- Web: [<web-container-app>](https://<web-container-app>.<azure-container-app-suffix>.eastus.azurecontainerapps.io)
- Health: [API Health Check](https://<web-container-app>.<azure-container-app-suffix>.eastus.azurecontainerapps.io/api/health?deep=true)

**Resources:**
- Container Apps Environment
- PostgreSQL Flexible Server
- Azure Cache for Redis
- Azure Blob Storage
- Key Vault
